title: Flashing KISS Logo GIF
description: An animated GIF inspired by many others I've seen online of the KISS logo. Created using Procreate.

title: Ace Frehley Dynasty Era Portrait
description: A portrait of Ace Frehley, KISS' original lead guitarist, in his Dynasty-era (circa 1979) costume, created in Procreate. Rest in peace, Space Ace.

title: The Heavenly Spaceman
description: A portrait of late KISS guitarist Ace Frehley in Heaven. I was asked by one of my closest friends, who is the biggest KISS fan I know, to create this after the passing of Ace Frehley. Created using Procreate.

title: A KISSmas Card
description: A Christmas card I created for one of my closest friends. He and I are depicted here in front of our favorite band, KISS. Created using Procreate.

title: Road to Tucson
description: A portrait of a desert road at sunset. Inspired by my many trips back and forth between Tucson and San Tan Valley, Arizona. Created using Procreate.

title: Sailing
description: A 2D piece created in Procreate based on the song "Sailing" by Christopher Cross. Created using Procreate.

title: The Veldt
description: A 2D piece created in Procreate based on the song "The Veldt" by deadmau5 and Chris James. Created using Procreate.

title: Voyage to Atlantis
description: A 2D piece created in Procreate based on the song "Voyage to Atlantis" by The Isley Brothers. Created using Procreate.
audio: ./assets/audio/The Isley Brothers - Voyage to Atlantis (Official Audio).mp3

title: aquatic ambience
description: A 2D piece created in Procreate based on the song "aquatic ambience" by scizzie. Created using Procreate.

title: Badge and gun
description: A 2D piece created in Procreate based on the song "Badge and gun" by Sunglasses Kid and Jonny Diggens.

title: Night Swim
description: A 2D piece created in Procreate based on the song "Night Swim" by Sunglasses Kid and Myrone.

title: Cherish Your Memories…
description: Remixed art inspired by the work of 3D artist and animator Trey Trimble. Created using Procreate.

title: Technology of 1981
description: A 1980s-inspired poster depicting different types of technology popular in the 80s. Created using Procreate, intended for showcasing at Ylem's 45th Anniversary Celebration.

title: Atlanta Hawks Graffiti
description: A graffiti-inspired rendition of the Atlanta Hawks basketball team logo. Created using Procreate.

title: Echoes Promotional Poster
description: A poster I created advertising Echoes, a Pink Floyd tribute band that one of my closest friends plays guitar for. Created using Procreate.

title: Synthwave Camaro
description: A Chevy Camaro poster with elements of the Synthwave aesthetic, such as the slotted sun and the glowing grid floor. Created using Procreate.

title: Hotel California x Synthwave
description: A piece I created inspired by Synthwave aesthetics and also the song "Hotel California" by The Eagles. Created using Procreate.

title: Vicks Vaporwave
description: A rather humorous piece I created inspired by looking at a jar of Vicks Vapo-Rub. I put a Vaporwave spin on the medicine by including neon cool-tone colors, Roman-style pillars, Japanese text, etc. Created using Procreate.

title: Nostalgia
description: A Synthwave-inspired piece I submitted for the Bay Area Creative Youth Awards back in 2023. I didn't win, but I had fun making it nonetheless. Created using Procreate.

title: Olive Oyl’s Mixtape Playlist Thumbnail
description: A thumbnail I drew for one of my own playlists on Apple Music. My two friends that I met at SJSU affectionately call me "Olive Oyl," which inspired the playlist name. On the playlist is every kind of genre imaginable, from hard rock, to R&B, to country. Created using Procreate.

title: Paul Stanley Portrait
description: A portrait of Paul Stanley, my favorite member of KISS, depicting what he looked like during the band's Crazy Nights era. Created using Procreate.

title: KISS Cards Tattoo
description: A tattoo I designed for myself depicting the four ace cards in a deck, plus a card featuring the KISS Army logo. I got this tattooed on my right shoulder on November 15th, 2025. Created using Procreate.

title: Magik Touch Poster
description: A poster I designed for a fictitious all-female KISS tribute band called Magik Touch (an intentional misspelling of one of my favorite KISS songs). Created using Procreate.

title: Ozzy Osbourne Bat Tattoo Design
description: A tattoo of a bat bearing likeness to the late great Ozzy Osbourne. I made this shortly after Osbourne passed and planned to get it tattooed somewhere on my body. Created using Procreate.

title: Shadow the Hedgehog Poster
description: My girlfriend absolutely adores Shadow the Hedgehog, so I drew this poster piece specifically for her. I was going to wait until her birthday to show her the piece, but I wanted to get her approval to include it in my portfolio. Thankfully, she loved it. Created using Procreate.
